name: voa-platform
description: Visions of Aetherius — launcher, API, CDN tooling

scripts.build: npm run build -w @voa/shared && npm run build -w @voa/api && npm run build -w voa-launcher
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @voa/shared && npm run build -w @voa/api
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @voa/shared && npm run dev -w @voa/api
scripts.dev:launcher: npm run build -w @voa/shared && npm run dev -w voa-launcher
scripts.dist:launcher: npm run build -w @voa/shared && npm run dist -w voa-launcher
